prompt: Fine-tune deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-instruct on a Python function-completion dataset. Source: ./data/funcs.jsonl with 'docstring' and 'body' keys. Format as a Python function template: 'def f():\n    """{docstring}"""\n{body}'. LoRA rank 24 alpha 48 on q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/o_proj plus gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj. SFTTrainer, 1 epoch, batch size 1, grad accumulation 8, lr 1e-4, bf16. Save to ./out/dsc-funcs.

criteria.description: Runs 1 epoch on 10 synthetic samples without raising

reference_solution:
from datasets import load_dataset
from peft import LoraConfig, PeftModel
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from trl import SFTConfig, SFTTrainer

model_id = 'deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-instruct'
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id, trust_remote_code=True)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
    tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(
    model_id, torch_dtype='bfloat16', trust_remote_code=True)

ds = load_dataset('json', data_files='./data/funcs.jsonl', split='train')
ds = ds.map(lambda r: {
    'text': f'def f():\n    """{r["docstring"]}"""\n{r["body"]}'
})

lora = LoraConfig(r=24, lora_alpha=48, lora_dropout=0.05,
                  target_modules=['q_proj','k_proj','v_proj','o_proj',
                                  'gate_proj','up_proj','down_proj'],
                  bias='none', task_type='CAUSAL_LM')
args = SFTConfig(output_dir='./out/dsc-funcs',
                 per_device_train_batch_size=1,
                 gradient_accumulation_steps=8, num_train_epochs=1,
                 learning_rate=1e-4, bf16=True, save_strategy='no')
trainer = SFTTrainer(model=model, args=args, train_dataset=ds,
                     peft_config=lora, tokenizer=tokenizer)
trainer.train()
trainer.model.save_pretrained('./out/dsc-funcs')
_ = PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, './out/dsc-funcs')
